name: Cardiorespiratory Endurance
description: Measures the efficiency of the heart, lungs, and circulatory system during sustained physical activity.

name: Muscular Strength
description: Measures the maximum force a muscle or muscle group can produce in a single effort.

name: Muscular Endurance
description: Measures a muscle or muscle group's ability to sustain repeated contractions over time.

name: Flexibility
description: Measures the range of motion available at a joint or group of joints.

name: Body Composition
description: Measures the relative proportions of fat, muscle, and other tissue that make up body weight.

name: Speed & Agility
description: Measures the ability to accelerate, decelerate, and change direction quickly under control.
